titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 235: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 235. (A.R. No. 480 of 1925.) SEMBIYANMĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the central shrine, Kailāsanāthasvāmi temple. Rājarājakēsari (Rājarāja I)

This inscription records a directive to the chaturvēdibhaṭṭat-tānapperumakkaḷ of Sembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Aḷa-nāḍu, on the southern bank (of the river Kāvēri), founded by the queen Śrī-Parāntakaṉ-Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Śrī-Sembiyanmahādēviyār, the mother of Uttama-chōḷa asking them to feed themselves in the temple śrī Kayilāsam-uḍaiya mahādēvar on the day of Tirukkēṭṭai in the Chittirai month, the natal star of the above queen with the interest on 100 kāśu endowed by Ubhaṭṭayaṉ Sōrabbai alias Tribhuvanamahādēvi, the queen of Uttamachōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Irājarājakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu kumpanāyaṟṟuk kaṇṭaṉ maturāntakatevarāṉa śrī Uttamaco
ḻatevarai tiruvayiṟu vāyttaruḷiṉa Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār śrī piraāntakaṉ mātevaṭikaḷ(ḷa)ārāṉa śrī cempiyaṉ mātevi
yār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai Aḷanāṭṭu brahmateyam śrī cempiyaṉ māteviccatuvetimaṅkalattu Ivvūr Uṭaiya pirāṭ
ṭiyār vaittaruḷiṉa śrī kaiyilāsattu śāsanabeddhac caturveti paṭṭattāṉap perumakkaḷukku Iv
vūr śrī kayilāsamuṭaiya mahātevar śrī koyilile Ippirāṭṭiyār tirunāḷāṉa cittirait tirukkeṭṭai nāṉṟu me
yk kāṭṭiyuṇpatāka śrī Uttamacoḻa tevar teviyār nampirāṭṭiyār Ubhaṭṭayaṉ corappaiyārāṉa tiripuvaṉa māte
viyār kuṭutta kācu [ 100 Iddharmma] m cantirātittaval niṟkum vaṇṇam Ikkācu nūṟum mutal taṉāl vanta vraddhi
Ippirāṭṭiyār tirunāḷāṉa cittirait tirukkeṭṭai nāṉṟu śrī kayilāsatte meykāṭṭiyyuṇpatāka vaiyttatu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
